verses.latin_vulgate: Dicite fratribus vestris : Populus meus ; et sorori vestræ : Misericordiam consecuta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִמְר֥וּ לַאֲחֵיכֶ֖ם עַמִּ֑י וְלַאֲחוֹתֵיכֶ֖ם רֻחָֽמָה׃
verses.king_james: Say ye unto your brethren, Ammi; and to your sisters, Ru–hamah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicate matrem vestram, judicate,  quoniam ipsa non uxor mea,  et ego non vir ejus.  Auferat fornicationes suas a facie sua,  et adulteria sua de medio uberum suorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רִ֤יבוּ בְאִמְּכֶם֙ רִ֔יבוּ כִּי־הִיא֙ לֹ֣א אִשְׁתִּ֔י וְאָנֹכִ֖י לֹ֣א אִישָׁ֑הּ וְתָסֵ֤ר זְנוּנֶ֙יהָ֙ מִפָּנֶ֔יהָ וְנַאֲפוּפֶ֖יהָ מִבֵּ֥ין שָׁדֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Plead with your mother, plead: for she is not my wife, neither am I her husband: let her therefore put away her whoredoms out of her sight, and her adulteries from between her breasts;

verses.latin_vulgate: ne forte expoliem eam nudam,  et statuam eam secundum diem nativitatis suæ,  et ponam eam quasi solitudinem,  et statuam eam velut terram inviam,  et interficiam eam siti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּן־אַפְשִׁיטֶ֣נָּה עֲרֻמָּ֔ה וְהִ֨צַּגְתִּ֔יהָ כְּי֖וֹם הִוָּֽלְדָ֑הּ וְשַׂמְתִּ֣יהָ כַמִּדְבָּ֗ר וְשַׁתִּ֙הָ֙ כְּאֶ֣רֶץ צִיָּ֔ה וַהֲמִתִּ֖יהָ בַּצָּמָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Lest I strip her naked, and set her as in the day that she was born, and make her as a wilderness, and set her like a dry land, and slay her with thirst.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et filiorum illius non miserebor,  quoniam filii fornicationum sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בָּנֶ֖יהָ לֹ֣א אֲרַחֵ֑ם כִּֽי־בְנֵ֥י זְנוּנִ֖ים הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.king_james: And I will not have mercy upon her children; for they be the children of whoredoms.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia fornicata est mater eorum,  confusa est quæ concepit eos ;  quia dixit : Vadam post amatores meos,  qui dant panes mihi, et aquas meas,  lanam meam, et linum meum,  oleum meum, et potum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י זָֽנְתָה֙ אִמָּ֔ם הֹבִ֖ישָׁה הוֹרָתָ֑ם כִּ֣י אָמְרָ֗ה אֵלְכָ֞ה אַחֲרֵ֤י מְאַֽהֲבַי֙ נֹתְנֵ֤י לַחְמִי֙ וּמֵימַ֔י צַמְרִ֣י וּפִשְׁתִּ֔י שַׁמְנִ֖י וְשִׁקּוּיָֽי׃
verses.king_james: For their mother hath played the harlot: she that conceived them hath done shamefully: for she said, I will go after my lovers, that give me my bread and my water, my wool and my flax, mine oil and my drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc ecce ego sepiam viam tuam spinis,  et sepiam eam maceria, et semitas suas non inveniet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֛ן הִנְנִי־שָׂ֥ךְ אֶת־דַּרְכֵּ֖ךְ בַּסִּירִ֑ים וְגָֽדַרְתִּי֙ אֶת־גְּדֵרָ֔הּ וּנְתִיבוֹתֶ֖יהָ לֹ֥א תִמְצָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, I will hedge up thy way with thorns, and make a wall, that she shall not find her paths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sequetur amatores suos, et non apprehendet eos ;  et quæret eos, et non inveniet :  et dicet : Vadam, et revertar ad virum meum priorem,  quia bene mihi erat tunc magis quam nunc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרִדְּפָ֤ה אֶת־מְאַהֲבֶ֙יהָ֙ וְלֹא־תַשִּׂ֣יג אֹתָ֔ם וּבִקְשָׁ֖תַם וְלֹ֣א תִמְצָ֑א וְאָמְרָ֗ה אֵלְכָ֤ה וְאָשׁ֙וּבָה֙ אֶל־אִישִׁ֣י הָרִאשׁ֔וֹן כִּ֣י ט֥וֹב לִ֛י אָ֖ז מֵעָֽתָּה׃
verses.king_james: And she shall follow after her lovers, but she shall not overtake them; and she shall seek them, but shall not find them: then shall she say, I will go and return to my first husband; for then was it better with me than now.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hæc nescivit, quia ego dedi ei frumentum, et vinum, et oleum,  et argentum multiplicavi ei, et aurum,  quæ fecerunt Baal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִיא֙ לֹ֣א יָֽדְעָ֔ה כִּ֤י אָֽנֹכִי֙ נָתַ֣תִּי לָ֔הּ הַדָּגָ֖ן וְהַתִּיר֣וֹשׁ וְהַיִּצְהָ֑ר וְכֶ֨סֶף הִרְבֵּ֥יתִי לָ֛הּ וְזָהָ֖ב עָשׂ֥וּ לַבָּֽעַל׃
verses.king_james: For she did not know that I gave her corn, and wine, and oil, and multiplied her silver and gold, which they prepared for Baal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco convertar, et sumam frumentum meum in tempore suo,  et vinum meum in tempore suo.  Et liberabo lanam meam et linum meum,  quæ operiebant ignominiam ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֣ן אָשׁ֔וּב וְלָקַחְתִּ֤י דְגָנִי֙ בְּעִתּ֔וֹ וְתִירוֹשִׁ֖י בְּמוֹעֲד֑וֹ וְהִצַּלְתִּי֙ צַמְרִ֣י וּפִשְׁתִּ֔י לְכַסּ֖וֹת אֶת־עֶרְוָתָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore will I return, and take away my corn in the time thereof, and my wine in the season thereof, and will recover my wool and my flax given to cover her nakedness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc revelabo stultitiam ejus in oculis amatorum ejus ;  et vir non eruet eam de manu mea ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֛ה אֲגַלֶּ֥ה אֶת־נַבְלֻתָ֖הּ לְעֵינֵ֣י מְאַהֲבֶ֑יהָ וְאִ֖ישׁ לֹא־יַצִּילֶ֥נָּה מִיָּדִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And now will I discover her lewdness in the sight of her lovers, and none shall deliver her out of mine hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: et cessare faciam omne gaudium ejus,  solemnitatem ejus, neomeniam ejus, sabbatum ejus,  et omnia festa tempora ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִשְׁבַּתִּי֙ כׇּל־מְשׂוֹשָׂ֔הּ חַגָּ֖הּ חׇדְשָׁ֣הּ וְשַׁבַּתָּ֑הּ וְכֹ֖ל מוֹעֲדָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: I will also cause all her mirth to cease, her feast days, her new moons, and her sabbaths, and all her solemn feasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et corrumpam vineam ejus, et ficum ejus,  de quibus dixit : Mercedes hæ meæ sunt,  quas dederunt mihi amatores mei ;  et ponam eam in saltum,  et comedet eam bestia agri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲשִׁמֹּתִ֗י גַּפְנָהּ֙ וּתְאֵ֣נָתָ֔הּ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָמְרָ֗ה אֶתְנָ֥ה הֵ֙מָּה֙ לִ֔י אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתְנוּ־לִ֖י מְאַהֲבָ֑י וְשַׂמְתִּ֣ים לְיַ֔עַר וַאֲכָלָ֖תַם חַיַּ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: And I will destroy her vines and her fig trees, whereof she hath said, These are my rewards that my lovers have given me: and I will make them a forest, and the beasts of the field shall eat them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et visitabo super eam dies Baalim,  quibus accendebat incensum,  et ornabatur in aure sua, et monili suo.  Et ibat post amatores suos,  et mei obliviscebatur, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָקַדְתִּ֣י עָלֶ֗יהָ אֶת־יְמֵ֤י הַבְּעָלִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תַּקְטִ֣יר לָהֶ֔ם וַתַּ֤עַד נִזְמָהּ֙ וְחֶלְיָתָ֔הּ וַתֵּ֖לֶךְ אַחֲרֵ֣י מְאַהֲבֶ֑יהָ וְאֹתִ֥י שָׁכְחָ֖ה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And I will visit upon her the days of Baalim, wherein she burned incense to them, and she decked herself with her earrings and her jewels, and she went after her lovers, and forgat me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc ecce ego lactabo eam,  et ducam eam in solitudinem,  et loquar ad cor ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן הִנֵּ֤ה אָנֹכִי֙ מְפַתֶּ֔יהָ וְהֹלַכְתִּ֖יהָ הַמִּדְבָּ֑ר וְדִבַּרְתִּ֖י עַל־לִבָּֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore, behold, I will allure her, and bring her into the wilderness, and speak comfortably unto her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo ei vinitores ejus ex eodem loco,  et vallem Achor, ad aperiendam spem ;  et canet ibi juxta dies juventutis suæ,  et juxta dies ascensionis suæ de terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַ֨תִּי לָ֤הּ אֶת־כְּרָמֶ֙יהָ֙ מִשָּׁ֔ם וְאֶת־עֵ֥מֶק עָכ֖וֹר לְפֶ֣תַח תִּקְוָ֑ה וְעָ֤נְתָה שָּׁ֙מָּה֙ כִּימֵ֣י נְעוּרֶ֔יהָ וּכְי֖וֹם עֲלוֹתָ֥הּ מֵאֶרֶץ־מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And I will give her her vineyards from thence, and the valley of Achor for a door of hope: and she shall sing there, as in the days of her youth, and as in the day when she came up out of the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa, ait Dominus :  vocabit me, Vir meus,  et non vocabit me ultra Baali.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה בַיּוֹם־הַהוּא֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה תִּקְרְאִ֖י אִישִׁ֑י וְלֹא־תִקְרְאִי־לִ֥י ע֖וֹד בַּעְלִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And it shall be at that day, saith the Lord, that thou shalt call me Ishi; and shalt call me no more Baali.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auferam nomina Baalim de ore ejus,  et non recordabitur ultra nominis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲסִרֹתִ֛י אֶת־שְׁמ֥וֹת הַבְּעָלִ֖ים מִפִּ֑יהָ וְלֹא־יִזָּכְר֥וּ ע֖וֹד בִּשְׁמָֽם׃
verses.king_james: For I will take away the names of Baalim out of her mouth, and they shall no more be remembered by their name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et percutiam cum eis fœdus in die illa, cum bestia agri,  et cum volucre cæli, et cum reptili terræ ;  et arcum, et gladium, et bellum conteram de terra,  et dormire eos faciam fiducialiter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכָרַתִּ֨י לָהֶ֤ם בְּרִית֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֔וּא עִם־חַיַּ֤ת הַשָּׂדֶה֙ וְעִם־ע֣וֹף הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם וְרֶ֖מֶשׂ הָאֲדָמָ֑ה וְקֶ֨שֶׁת וְחֶ֤רֶב וּמִלְחָמָה֙ אֶשְׁבּ֣וֹר מִן־הָאָ֔רֶץ וְהִשְׁכַּבְתִּ֖ים לָבֶֽטַח׃
verses.king_james: And in that day will I make a covenant for them with the beasts of the field, and with the fowls of heaven, and with the creeping things of the ground: and I will break the bow and the sword and the battle out of the earth, and will make them to lie down safely.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sponsabo te mihi in sempiternum ;  et sponsabo te mihi in justitia, et judicio,  et in misericordia, et in miserationibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵרַשְׂתִּ֥יךְ לִ֖י לְעוֹלָ֑ם וְאֵרַשְׂתִּ֥יךְ לִי֙ בְּצֶ֣דֶק וּבְמִשְׁפָּ֔ט וּבְחֶ֖סֶד וּֽבְרַחֲמִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And I will betroth thee unto me for ever; yea, I will betroth thee unto me in righteousness, and in judgment, and in lovingkindness, and in mercies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sponsabo te mihi in fide ;  et scies quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵרַשְׂתִּ֥יךְ לִ֖י בֶּאֱמוּנָ֑ה וְיָדַ֖עַתְּ אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: I will even betroth thee unto me in faithfulness: and thou shalt know the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa :  exaudiam, dicit Dominus, exaudiam cælos,  et illi exaudient terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא אֶֽעֱנֶה֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶעֱנֶ֖ה אֶת־הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְהֵ֖ם יַעֲנ֥וּ אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, I will hear, saith the Lord, I will hear the heavens, and they shall hear the earth;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et terra exaudiet triticum, et vinum, et oleum,  et hæc exaudient Jezrahel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָאָ֣רֶץ תַּעֲנֶ֔ה אֶת־הַדָּגָ֖ן וְאֶת־הַתִּיר֣וֹשׁ וְאֶת־הַיִּצְהָ֑ר וְהֵ֖ם יַעֲנ֥וּ אֶֽת־יִזְרְעֶֽאל׃
verses.king_james: And the earth shall hear the corn, and the wine, and the oil; and they shall hear Jezreel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et seminabo eam mihi in terra,  et miserebor ejus quæ fuit Absque misericordia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּזְרַעְתִּ֤יהָ לִּי֙ בָּאָ֔רֶץ וְרִחַמְתִּ֖י אֶת־לֹ֣א רֻחָ֑מָה וְאָמַרְתִּ֤י לְלֹֽא־עַמִּי֙ עַמִּי־אַ֔תָּה וְה֖וּא יֹאמַ֥ר אֱלֹהָֽי׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And I will sow her unto me in the earth; and I will have mercy upon her that had not obtained mercy; and I will say to them which were not my people, Thou art my people; and they shall say, Thou art my God.
